title: ˖ ࣪ ⊹ You guys are the highlight of my year ⊹ ࣪˖
author: Martina ✧
message:
When I first arrived in Amsterdam, I knew it was gonna be the best year of my life but it was the Mentor Program that gave me many memorable experiences, helped me meet new people and gave me an opportunity to hangout with my friends. I will never forget the Efteling trip, which I would have never done on my own, and it was literally my dreams coming true ♡ And also the pancake boat, which still feels like a fever dream haha !
Through your engagement and good spirits, you allowed all of us first years to feel welcome even far from our countries, make life-long memories and friendships, and explore Amsterdam (and even other places in the NL!) to an extent we probably wouldn't on our own. I am forever grateful for that ! All the best for you guys ♡
